name: Umami
description: Umami — Product Analytics tool for developers. Specializes in Web Analytics.

seo.title: Umami Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Umami analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Product Analytics.

review.verdict: Umami is a Product Analytics tool.
pros: Deep funnel and cohort analysis for product decisions
cons: Steeper learning curve for non-technical stakeholders
review.best_for: Product teams tracking user behavior and retention
review.not_for: Marketing-only analytics or pure content sites
